title: Will there be a new apps competition?
excerpt: Hello! I was wondering if there was going to be another apps competition in the near future?

posts.author: EricMonday (Eric Detjen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I was wondering if there was going to be another apps competition in the near future?

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @EricMonday

I’m glad you’re interested in our app challenges I love the spirit!

I can’t shed more light on this just yet, but please stay tuned.

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
